caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" and a black baseball cap with a gold emblem is seated in a recording studio, wearing over-ear headphones. He is speaking into a professional microphone on a stand. In the background, a white wall features gold stars and the words "BOSS HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101." On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a logo on the right that says "BOSS TALK 101." As the scene progresses, the man gesticulates with his hands to emphasize his points; he begins with his right hand open and raised, then lowers it toward his chest, and eventually settles into a more neutral posture while continuing to speak. The camera angle remains static, focusing on the man from the waist up.
